children.label: i
children.text: Receiving a free appropriate public education.

children.label: ii
children.text: Participating in regular education.

children.label: iii
children.text: In separate classes, separate schools or facilities, or public or private residential facilities.

children.label: iv
children.text: For each year of age from age 14 through 21, stopped receiving special education and related services because of program completion (including graduation with a regular secondary school diploma), or other reasons, and the reasons why those children stopped receiving special education and related services.

children.label: I
children.text: Removed to an interim alternative educational setting under .section 1415(k)(1) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: The acts or items precipitating those removals.

children.label: III
children.text: The number of children with disabilities who are subject to long-term suspensions or expulsions.

children.label: B
children.text: The number and percentage of children with disabilities, by race, gender, and ethnicity, who are receiving early intervention services.

children.label: C
children.text: The number and percentage of children with disabilities, by race, gender, and ethnicity, who, from birth through age 2, stopped receiving early intervention services because of program completion or for other reasons.

children.label: D
children.text: The incidence and duration of disciplinary actions by race, ethnicity, limited English proficiency status, gender, and disability category, of children with disabilities, including suspensions of 1 day or more.

children.label: E
children.text: The number and percentage of children with disabilities who are removed to alternative educational settings or expelled as compared to children without disabilities who are removed to alternative educational settings or expelled.

children.label: F
children.text: The number of due process complaints filed under and the number of hearings conducted.section 1415 of this title

children.label: G
children.text: The number of hearings requested under and the number of changes in placements ordered as a result of those hearings.section 1415(k) of this title

children.label: H
children.text: The number of mediations held and the number of settlement agreements reached through such mediations.

The number and percentage of infants and toddlers, by race, and ethnicity, who are at risk of having substantial developmental delays (as defined in ), and who are receiving early intervention services under subchapter III.section 1432 of this title
Any other information that may be required by the Secretary.

children.heading: Protection of identifiable data
children.label: 1 Protection of identifiable data
children.text: The data described in subsection (a) shall be publicly reported by each State in a manner that does not result in the disclosure of data identifiable to individual children.

children.heading: Sampling
children.label: 2 Sampling
children.text: The Secretary may permit States and the Secretary of the Interior to obtain the data described in subsection (a) through sampling.

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: c Technical assistance
children.text: The Secretary may provide technical assistance to States to ensure compliance with the data collection and reporting requirements under this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: the identification of children as children with disabilities, including the identification of children as children with disabilities in accordance with a particular impairment described in ;section 1401(3) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the placement in particular educational settings of such children; and

children.label: C
children.text: the incidence, duration, and type of disciplinary actions, including suspensions and expulsions.

children.heading: Review and revision of policies, practices, and procedures
children.label: 2 Review and revision of policies, practices, and procedures
A
children.text: provide for the review and, if appropriate, revision of the policies, procedures, and practices used in such identification or placement to ensure that such policies, procedures, and practices comply with the requirements of this chapter;

children.label: B
children.text: require any local educational agency identified under paragraph (1) to reserve the maximum amount of funds under to provide comprehensive coordinated early intervening services to serve children in the local educational agency, particularly children in those groups that were significantly overidentified under paragraph (1); andsection 1413(f) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: require the local educational agency to publicly report on the revision of policies, practices, and procedures described under subparagraph (A).
